meaning: adj.权威认可的,审定的,经授权的
examples: I have authorized him to act for me while I am away.
You understand that any authorized signer on your current account can access your credit line.
Parliament has in fact already authorized the government to tame the tobacco trade.
Both statutes agree that the governor is authorized to set the date for such an election.
Route 125 was one of four tests authorized by the state legislature in 1989.
